task_goal: Edit note_HrbOn.txt in Markor. Add to the top of the note Inconceivable!
task_goal_rewrite: The note file note_HrbOn.txt in Markor has the text 'Inconceivable!' added as its first line, and the edited content is saved.

checkpoints.description: note_HrbOn.txt in Markor contains 'Inconceivable!' as the very first line, preceding any original content.
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshot of note_HrbOn.txt open in Markor displaying 'Inconceivable!' at the top of the text area; or a view of the file's stored content confirming the text is the first line.

checkpoints.description: The edits to note_HrbOn.txt are saved, with no unsaved changes indicated in Markor's UI.
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshot showing Markor's interface for note_HrbOn.txt with no unsaved changes marker (e.g., an asterisk next to the filename); or confirmation that a save action was executed successfully.

success_rule: Success is achieved when both required checkpoints are satisfied: note_HrbOn.txt has 'Inconceivable!' as the first line, and the changes are saved in Markor.
